config.user_description: Migrate the CRM backend from better-sqlite3 to @libsql/client (Turso-compatible) and prepare the app for Vercel deployment via GitHub Actions: async DB driver swap with file: URL fallback for local/CI, async ripple through services/routes with Express 4 asyncHandler, DB-backed sessions, api/index.ts + vercel.json packaging (Angular static), GitHub Actions workflow with tests on PR and prod deploy from main only. No vercel link/deploy yet (team and Turso DB pending).
config.special_instructions: Local dev (./start.sh, tsx --watch) must keep working unchanged. Backend Playwright + frontend Karma suites must pass. PRD per project convention with ## Implementierung section and PRD: footer in commits.
